title: Protocol Cybersecurity Studio
problem_purchased: Buyers purchase release-gate confidence on value-moving protocol paths before shipping governance and settlement changes.
review_posture: evidence-first adversarial review with replayable repro artifacts
pricing_mode_illustrative: fixed mandate fee + severity-weighted bonus for accepted replayable findings
release_gate_positioning: block release until mandate packet meets declared evidence and safety thresholds
why_archive_compounds: Each accepted packet hardens ontology, query bundles, and evidence templates, reducing future time-to-first-accepted output while maintaining safety.
sovereign_candidate_path: When adjacent mandates repeatedly pass strict thresholds with explicit package dependence and no safety regression, the archive graduates toward Protocol Cybersecurity Sovereign candidacy.
synthetic_disclaimer: This artifact is synthetic and illustrative for local replay.
doctrine_boundary: This positions protocol cybersecurity as the first narrow high-verification organ and seed for broader future capability; it does not claim full cybersecurity sovereignty already exists.
